description: Nookipedia is a community-run Animal Crossing wiki and data source. It publishes structured game data and wiki content for developers through its own API services and MediaWiki installation.
summary: Nookipedia exposes three HTTP developer surfaces on its own domains: the current keyed REST API at api.nookipedia.com, a deprecated legacy keyed API at nookipedia.com/api, and the site’s standard MediaWiki API at nookipedia.com/w/api.php; no GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surfaced.
